name: VIRTUS INVESTMENT PARTNERS, INC.
summary: Virtus Investment Partners, Inc. is a Delaware corporation providing investment management and related services to institutions and individuals. Using a multi-manager, multi-style approach, it offers strategies across equity, fixed income, multi-asset, and alternatives through affiliated investment managers and unaffiliated subadvisers. Products include mutual funds, ETFs, closed-end funds, retail separate accounts, institutional accounts, and wealth advisory services. As of December 31, 2025, total assets under management were $159.5 billion.
